heroHeadline: 5,300 Years of Pakistan: Indus Valley to Modern Governance Crisis
heroSubtitle: From Mohenjo-daro to Islamabad — tracking one of the world's oldest continuous civilizations through partition, military coups, nuclear tests, and ongoing political instability.
footerNote: Data sourced from official government records, major news outlets, academic institutions, and international organizations including the UN, IMF, and World Bank.
